Create and sell your NFTs

Step-01

Set up your wallet

Powerful features and inclusions, which makes Bids Sea Community standout, easily customizable and scalable.

Step-02

Create your collection

A great collection of beautiful website templates for your need. Choose the best suitable template.

Step-03

Add your NFT's

We've made the template fully responsive, so it looks great on all devices: desktop, tablets and mobile

Step-04

Sell Your NFT's

Finally, sell your NFTs and make cool money
